mapper.update: UPDATE audit_record SET auditor_id = #{auditorId}, auditor_name = #{auditorName}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_opinion = #{auditOpinion}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND audit_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM audit_record WHERE audit_type IN ('CERTIFICATE', 'CERTIFICATE_APPEAL')
AND target_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{certificateNumber}, '%')
AND audit_status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC
